purpose: Typer CLI. All commands defined here. Zero business logic — delegates everything.
app_init: app = typer.Typer(name='ucgen', help='Generate structured use case documents from natural language.', no_args_is_help=True)

commands.name: generate
commands.signature: def generate(idea: str = typer.Argument(...), actor: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None), output: Optional[Path] = typer.Option(None, '-o'), provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None), model: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None), format: str = typer.Option('markdown'), stdin: bool = typer.Option(False, '--stdin'), append: Optional[Path] = typer.Option(None))
behavior: If --append: append to existing file with --- separator

commands.name: run
commands.signature: def run(id: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--id'), tag: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--tag'), file: Path = typer.Option(Path('ucgen.yaml'), '--file'))
commands.docstring: Read ucgen.yaml and generate defined use cases. Tier 2 feature.
behavior: Check PyYAML installed — exit with pip install ucgen[project] if not

commands.name: status
commands.docstring: Show generation status of all use cases in ucgen.yaml.
behavior: Print Rich table: UC-ID | Title | Actor | Status | Generated At | File

commands.name: batch
commands.signature: def batch(input_file: Path = typer.Argument(...), output: Optional[Path] = typer.Option(None, '-o'), provider: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None), model: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None))
commands.docstring: Generate use cases from a file. Supports .txt (one idea per line) or .yaml (structured).
behavior: If .txt: read lines, skip blank and # comments
If .yaml: parse as list of {title, actor, context, priority} dicts
Run generate() for each with Rich progress bar
Print summary: N succeeded, M failed

commands.name: validate
commands.docstring: Validate a .md use case file or directory of .md files.
behavior: If path is dir: validate all .md files
Print Rich table with per-section PASS/FAIL

commands.name: init
commands.docstring: Create .ucgenrc.toml with defaults in current directory.

commands.name: init_project
commands.signature: def init_project(name: str = typer.Argument(...), domain: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None))
commands.docstring: Scaffold a ucgen.yaml for a new project.

commands.name: log
commands.signature: def log(quick: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--quick', help='One-liner mistake description'))
commands.docstring: Log a correction to memory/mistakes/ so it is never repeated.
behavior: If --quick: parse from git diff --name-only HEAD for file, use quick string as description
If interactive: prompt for file, what happened, why wrong, correct approach
Auto-generate M-NNN ID from mistakes.idx line count + 1

commands.name: gc
commands.docstring: Garbage collect memory: archive old mistakes, graduate high-recurrence to CONVENTIONS.
behavior: Archive entries older than 90 days with recurrence=0 to memory/archive/
Graduate entries with recurrence>=3 to CONVENTIONS file, remove from mistakes

commands.name: version
commands.docstring: Print version and provider availability status.

slug_rules: actor + first 3 significant words of goal, lowercased, spaces to hyphens, max 40 chars
